context: Tests whether the agent correctly scripts the issue lifecycle for a bug/regression, applying the skill's rules for file naming, reviewMatrix composition, bug-specific steps (reproduction, isRegression), worktree flag usage, and parallel reviewer fan-out. The scenario uses a real-looking authentication regression that touches session tokens and Redis, which should trigger security reviewer activation.

checklist.name: Issue-scoped plan filename
checklist.description: The plan YAML filename in lifecycle.sh includes the issue name AND a version suffix (e.g. /tmp/plan-issue-<name>-v1.yaml), NOT a generic name like /tmp/plan.yaml or /tmp/plan-input.yaml

checklist.name: Issue-scoped triage filename
checklist.description: The triage YAML filename in lifecycle.sh includes the issue name (e.g. /tmp/triage-issue-<name>.yaml), NOT a generic name like /tmp/triage.yaml

checklist.name: Issue-scoped findings filename
checklist.description: The findings YAML filename in lifecycle.sh includes the issue name (e.g. /tmp/findings-issue-<name>.yaml), NOT a generic name like /tmp/findings.yaml

checklist.name: security=true in reviewMatrix
checklist.description: plan-input.yaml has reviewMatrix.security set to true (authentication/token/Redis cache work qualifies)

checklist.name: code+adversarial always true
checklist.description: plan-input.yaml has both reviewMatrix.code and reviewMatrix.adversarial set to true

checklist.name: isRegression=true in triage
checklist.description: The triage call in lifecycle.sh passes isRegression=true (users said 'it used to work', the bug was introduced by a recent deploy)

checklist.name: Reproduction step in triage YAML
checklist.description: triage-input.yaml contains a reproduced field with status (reproduced | could-not-reproduce | not-applicable) and notes containing Steps/Observed/Expected

checklist.name: record_prior_art called
checklist.description: lifecycle.sh includes a call to record_prior_art before the plan method call

checklist.name: hydrate called after review
checklist.description: lifecycle.sh includes a call to swamp model method run ... hydrate after the reviewer fan-out (record_review calls), followed by swamp data get ... hydrate --json

checklist.name: Parallel reviewer fan-out
checklist.description: lifecycle.sh shows the reviewer skills (review-code, review-adversarial, review-security) being invoked together as a batch, OR a comment explicitly stating they are run in parallel/simultaneously

checklist.name: --repo-dir flag on swamp commands
checklist.description: The swamp commands in lifecycle.sh include --repo-dir /workspace/myapp (or equivalent main repo path), because the script runs from a worktree

checklist.name: Rich plan steps with files and risks
checklist.description: plan-input.yaml steps are objects with order, description, files, and risks fields (not bare strings)
